name: Shuttleroid
desc: When this card is targeted for an attack: You can banish this card. Once per turn, during your next Standby Phase after this card was banished by this effect: Special Summon this banished card. If Summoned this way: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: When this card is targeted for an attack: You can banish this card. Once per turn, during your next Standby Phase after this card was banished by this effect: Special Summon this banished card. If Summoned this way: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.
